languages.text: "Он пожертвовал собой ради многих. Самоотверженность — высшее проявление праведности".
"He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
languages.original_text: "Он пожертвовал собой ради многих. Самоотверженность — высшее проявление праведности".

traits.locale_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
"He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
"He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

languages.text: 「彼は多くの人たちのために命を捧げた。無私無欲こそが正義の最高峰である」
languages.original_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は多くの人たちのために命を捧げた。無私無欲こそが正義の最高峰である。」

languages.text: “他为众人牺牲了自己。无私，即是正义的最高体现。”
languages.original_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: “他为众人牺牲了自己。无私，即是正义的最高体现。”

languages.text: «Se sacrificó para salvar muchas vidas. El altruismo es la mayor muestra de virtud».
languages.original_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: «Se sacrificó para salvar muchas vidas. El altruismo es la mayor muestra de virtud».

languages.text: "Er hat sich für viele geopfert. Selbstlosigkeit ist der höchste Ausdruck von Rechtschaffenheit."
languages.original_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: "Er hat sich für viele geopfert. Selbstlosigkeit ist der höchste Ausdruck von Rechtschaffenheit."

languages.text: « Il s'est sacrifié pour sauver de nombreuses vies. L'abnégation est la plus éminente expression de la vertu. »
languages.original_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: « Il s'est sacrifié pour sauver de nombreuses vies. L'abnégation est la plus éminente expression de la vertu. »

languages.text: "Kendini pek çok kişi için feda etmiş. Özveri, doğruluğun en yüksek ifadesidir."
languages.original_text: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: "Kendini pek çok kişi için feda etmiş. Özveri, doğruluğun en yüksek ifadesidir."
